case_title: WOOD ROBBINS, LLP VS. HILDA LAI
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUING WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE THEREWITH IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. IN ADDITION, IF DEFENDANT RETAINS AN ATTORNEY IN THE FUTURE, A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION MAY BE FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP

LAW AND MOTION PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE THEREWITH IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 14, 2018 AT 9:30. RESPONDENT'S OPPOSITION PAPERS DUE ON 10/29/18, PETITIONER'S REPLY IS DUE ON 11/6/18. IF THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT FILE OPPOSITION PAPERS, THE MOTION WIL BE GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED AND THE COURT WILL CONFORM THE ARBITRATION AWARD. ORDER IS SIGNED. A COPY IS GIVEN TO BOTH PARTIES. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Wood, Esq. 415-247-7900 x206 for Petitioner.
Hilda Lai, 415-283-7570 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP's Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith.

Petitioner Wood Robbins, LLP's petition for order confirming arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. In addition, If Defendant retains an attorney in the future, a motion for reconsideration may be filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leyla Pasic, Esq. 415-247-7900 of Wood Robbins for Petitioner Wood Robbins.
Hilda Lai, 415-283-7570 Respondent in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court calls Petitioner's Counsel on the phone on the first calling of the case.

9:56 am. The matter is recalled when Petitioner's Counsel arrives. Defendant informs the Court she does not need an Interpreter and can understand English.

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP's Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith.

Continued to November 14, 2018 at 9:30. Respondent's opposition papers due on 10/29/18, Petitioner's Reply is due on 11/6/18. If the Defendant does not file Opposition papers, the motion wil be granted as unopposed and the Court will confirm the arbitration award.

Order is signed. A copy is given to both parties. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
